title: Color Blind Friendly status bars
excerpt: Have a colorblind friendly option on status bars or other features that are color dependent. For example Trello has colorblind patterns that overlay the color options.

posts.author: Lpollino (Lauren Pollino)
posts.cookedHtml: Have a colorblind friendly option on status bars or other features that are color dependent. For example Trello has colorblind patterns that overlay the color options.
